parties.name: Meridian Health Systems, Inc.
parties.evidence_quote: Meridian Health Systems, Inc., a New York corporation

parties.name: Atlas Strategic Advisors LLC
parties.evidence_quote: Atlas Strategic Advisors LLC, a New York limited liability company

term.value: 12 months initial, auto-renewing for successive 12-month terms; non-renewal requires 60 days' notice
term.evidence_quote: The initial term of this Agreement is twelve (12) months from the Effective Date. Thereafter, the Agreement shall automatically renew for successive twelve (12) month terms

payment_terms.value: USD $250/hour unless an SOW specifies otherwise; monthly invoicing net 30; 1.5%/month late interest
payment_terms.evidence_quote: billed at the rate of two hundred fifty U.S. dollars (USD $250.00) per hour

deliverables.value: Consulting services per individual SOWs issued under this Agreement
deliverables.evidence_quote: Provider shall perform consulting services for Client as described in one or more Statements of Work

ip_ownership.value: Client owns SOW Deliverables (subject to payment); Provider retains pre-existing Provider Tools and grants Client a perpetual, non-exclusive license to use them with the Deliverables
ip_ownership.evidence_quote: Client shall own all right, title, and interest in and to the deliverables specifically produced for Client under an SOW

termination_clause.value: 30 days' notice for convenience; immediate for uncured material breach (15-day cure) or insolvency
termination_clause.evidence_quote: Either Party may terminate this Agreement or any individual SOW for convenience upon thirty (30) days' prior written notice

governing_law.evidence_quote: laws of the State of New York, without regard to its conflict of laws principles

limitation_of_liability.value: Capped at fees paid in trailing 12 months (except for confidentiality/indemnification breaches); no indirect/consequential damages
limitation_of_liability.evidence_quote: aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with this agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid by client to provider in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim
